# PostCraft AI Documentation

> PostCraft is an AI-powered social media post generator (supporting LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook, etc.) that ranks variants by engagement, clarity, and readability.

## Features
- Generate 3 distinct post variants from a single topic
- Intelligent hooks and formatting designed for your target platform (LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook)
- Personalized brand voice integration
- Automated library saving

## Endpoints
- [Dashboard](/)
- [Saved posts](/library)
- [Trending topics](/trending)
- [Brand configuration](/brand-voice)
